title: Detailed description pictures of Maris outfit
display_title: Detailed description pictures of Maris outfit
wikitext:
[]: Detailed description/pictures of Mari's outfit?             Quote Post by Makinami Mari » Sat Jul 04, 2009 12:28 am Hello all, I've been lurking for some time without a registered name, so I figured now would be a good time as I have a few questions. For those of you who have seen the leaked footage from Rebuild 2.0 or have gathered information from reputable sources, I'd like some specifics on Mari's outfit for a cosplay I'm planning. For one, does anyone have a good picture of the embroidered crest on her shirt? Is her tie red or green? Is her skirt red and black tartan or red and green tartan? What color are her stockings? Are her loafers brown, red, or black? Do they have a heel or are they flat? What color are the elastics she uses to tie back her pigtails? Are the elastics visable at all? Also on her general appearance, are her eyes blue, green, or teal? Anyone know her "actual" height, weight, etc? I ask because I've seen a few variations of all these things and would like to be as close to the movie as possible. I try to be thorough with my cosplays. Thank you all in advance for your help.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jul 04, 2009 2:12 am Her eyes are blue, her stockings (thigh highs, I think) seem black. Hope that helps as a start.

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Sat Jul 04, 2009 2:25 am Here ya go. [URL=http://img32.imageshack.us/i/769d090cb135d1fb4abab46.jpg/] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Makinami Mari » Sun Jul 05, 2009 5:22 pm Thank you, you were both helpful <3 I still need some more information though, I hope there are others who can help.

[]:             Quote Post by DanteNeverCry » Sun Jul 05, 2009 5:29 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Her eyes are blue

[]:             Quote Post by Makinami Mari » Sun Jul 05, 2009 5:37 pm Do either of you have a picture/reference from the movie itself to support your claim? I've only seen one shot of her eyes from the movie and they look light blue/teal to me, so its difficult to tell. I wanted second opinions for this reason.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sun Jul 05, 2009 5:45 pm i'm not gonna bother looking for the picture, but search for eva extra 3 it should have a cover showing her eyes

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jul 05, 2009 5:56 pm Gendopapa's current avatar and that Eva Extra 03 cover, her eyes are blue. Also, the pic linked to.

[]:             Quote Post by Makinami Mari » Mon Jul 06, 2009 5:38 pm Alright, so what I've collected so far.. The crest on her shirt appears to be a gold "T" or "J" on a green background. Her tie is green. I think I can sneak by with a red and black tartan, as it is easier to find than a proper red and green. Her stockings are a sort of purple/wine color, and are thigh-high. Her loafers are brown with a 1/4 inch block heel. I have not gotten any info on her elastics, so I will assume they can't be readily seen. I will simply use small black ones. Her eyes are a light blue/teal, and I have found the appropriate colored contacts. She appears to be of similar height to Shinji and slightly stockier than Asuka. She seems to have a more ample bust and hips than Asuka as well, but I'd need to see them side by side to be sure. I came to this conclusion using the character illustrations for comparison. Thank you all for your help, you may continue to provide information if you believe I have something wrong. I will continue to check back as I build my cosplay.

[]:             Quote Post by Makinami Mari » Thu Jul 16, 2009 3:43 pm Thank you all for your help, if anyone is going to Anime Festival Orlando, you may see me there

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Thu Jul 16, 2009 6:39 pm just google for her statue you find all you need there
